# Fuzzy C Means

**Summary**: A clustering technique where data points belong to multiple clusters with varying degrees of membership.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017]] used Fuzzy C-Means (FCM) to segment the dataset into three distinct lithological groups.

## Key Results and Findings

- FCM successfully separated data based on limestone and dolomite content, improving correlation coefficients for specific subsets. ([[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017, p. 97]])
